All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary Enum Summary 
    Class Description
    Calendar
    The implementation of CalendarInterface that creates and edit single event and event series.
    CalendarController
    The implementation of CalendarControllerInterface that takes in input, appoints to the specific command execution process accordingly, and transmits the result.
    CalendarEntity
    Represents a calendar entity with a unique name, timezone, and calendar.
    CalendarEntity.CalendarEntityBuilder
    Inner builder class for constructing a CalendarEntity object.
    CalendarEntityInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that a single calendar with name and timezone should support.
    CalendarEntityTest
    Test class for CalendarEntity.
    CalendarInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that a calendar should support.
    CalendarRunner
    Program runner.
    CalendarTest
    A placeholder test class.
    CalendarView
    Represents the view component for the calendar application.
    CalendarViewInterface
    Represents operations for displaying calendar information and messages.
    ControllerTest
    Test for ControllerTest Class.
    CopyCommand
    This class represents the process of event(s) copy.
    CreateCalendarCommand
    Command to create a new calendar.
    CreateCommand
    This class represents the process of event creation.
    CsvExporter
    A utility class responsible for converting a list of event objects into a CSV formatted string, which is suitable for exporting and viewing.
    CsvExporterTest
    Test class for CSVExporter.
    DummyCalendar
    A dummy calendar class.
    EditCalendarCommand
    Command to edit a calendar.
    EditCommand
    This class represents the process of event edition.
    EntityMockModel
    This is a mock model to replace the CalendarEntity for testing the controller in isolation.
    Event
    Represents a calendar event with a subject, start date & time, and optional details like end date & time, description, location and status.
    Event.EventBuilder
    Builder class for constructing an Event object.
    EventContext
    Parameter object for operating events, e.g.
    EventInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that an event should support.
    EventKey
    EventKey (subject + start + end) serves as the primal key of an event in calendar.
    EventSeries
    This class represents a series of recurring calendar events, and generates the individual event keys based on weekdays, occurrences/end date.
    EventSeries.EventSeriesBuilder
    Builder class for creating and reset instances.
    EventSeriesTest
    Test class for EventSeries.
    EventStatus
    This enum specifies the two status of an event.
    EventTest
    Test class for Event.
    EventWrapper
    To wrap up a class with event and its calendar property.
    ExportCommand
    Represents the process of handling export command.
    Features
    The features for GUI functions.
    ForthMockModel
    This is a mock model to replace the Calendar for testing the controller in isolation.
    GuiCalendarController
    The controller implementation for GUI mode supporting Features.
    GuiCalendarControllerTest
    The test for GuiCalendarController.
    GuiMultiCalendarManagerMockModel
    This is a mock model to replace the MultiCalendarManager for testing the controller in isolation.
    IcalExporter
    A utility class for exporting calendar events to iCal format.
    IcalExporterTest
    Test class for IcalExporter.
    JframeCalendarView
    Swing-based graphical user interface using JFrame.
    ManagerModelTest
    Test for MultiCalendarManager class.
    MockGuiView
    This is a mock view to replace the JframeCalendarView for testing the controller in isolation.
    ModelTest
    Test for Calendar Class.
    MultiCalendarManager
    This class implements interface MultiCalendarManagerInterface and offers create, edit a calendar and copy its event(s) to another calendar.
    MultiCalendarManagerInterface
    This interface contains necessary operations that a Multi Calendar Manager should support.
    MultiCalendarManagerMockModel
    This is a mock model to replace the MultiCalendarManager for testing the controller in isolation.
    PrintCommand
    Represents the process of handling print command.
    ShowCommand
    Represents the process of handling print command.
    UseCalendarCommand
    This class represents the process of using a calendar.
    UserStatus
    This enum specifies the two status of a user's calendar day or time.
    ViewCommandsTest
    Test for view command such as PrintCommand, ExportCommand, ShowCommand.
    ViewTest
    Test class for CalendarView.
